title: Senior Software Engineer, Agent Orchestration
description:
About Decagon

Decagon is the leading conversational AI platform empowering every brand to deliver concierge customer experiences. We enable enterprises like Avis Budget Group, Block's Cash App and Square, Chime, Oura Health, and Hunter Douglas to deploy AI agents across voice, chat, email, SMS, and other channels. Backed by investors including a16z, Accel, Bain Capital Ventures, Coatue, and Index Ventures. We operate as an in-office organization with values emphasizing execution, customer focus, competitive excellence, and interdisciplinary thinking.

About The Team

The Agent Orchestration team builds the core execution layer that powers every agent interaction. This includes systems for coordinating model reasoning, evaluating agent behavior, and ensuring reliable agent performance in customer environments. The team prioritizes correctness, reliability, and speed.

About The Role

As a Senior Software Engineer on the Agent Orchestration team, you will design and build systems that determine how Decagon agents operate in real-world conditions. You will own complex distributed systems challenges and create foundations for improving agent performance, reliability, and quality. The role offers significant autonomy and direct impact on advanced agent platform architecture.

Key Responsibilities

Build the execution engine powering intelligent agents at scale
Design systems coordinating model reasoning and actions while maintaining speed and correctness
Improve reliability through testing, observability, and safeguards
Build foundations helping teams evaluate and improve agent behavior safely and continuously

Required Qualifications

5+ years building production systems
Proficiency in Python or TypeScript
Comfort with asynchronous programming
Strong debugging skills across complex technical stacks
Ability designing reliable distributed systems handling real-world failure modes
Track record owning large technical projects end-to-end

Preferred Qualifications

Real-time or low-latency systems experience
Workflow engines, agents, or model-driven applications experience
Tooling or infrastructure building for engineers
Experimentation or evaluation systems experience

Benefits

Medical, dental, and vision coverage
Flexible vacation policy
Daily office meals and snacks
